caption: A screen recording captures a web browser open to a page on "RANDOM.ORG" titled "List Randomizer." The page features a text input area under "Part 1: Enter List Items" containing a list of names and phrases, including "Robert Flores," "Paul Dee Manelly," and "laçon tractor/MOL/1D9YS." The interface includes a search bar and a "True Random Number Service" link. In the bottom right corner, a small video overlay shows two people: one person wearing a red shirt and another in a dark shirt, both appearing to react with excitement. Beside them, text reads "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" next to a red YouTube "Subscribe" button. Across the frames, the cursor moves from the "Randomize" button toward the "Switch to Advanced Mode" button, while a website banner at the bottom reads "WWW.JAYSPYSCALEBREAKS.COM".
